---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new primitive or capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The motion you want

Describe the scroll/animation behaviour you're trying to express.

## Which catalog primitive is missing?

MotionSpec grows the **catalog**, not the model — a request the catalog can't
express is an escalation signal. If an existing primitive almost fits, name it.

## Proposed behaviour

Parameters, defaults, and the reduced-motion fallback you'd expect.

## Alternatives considered

Other primitives or workarounds you tried.
